title: Vanilla Plus Crops
description: Replaces every farm crop with original custom block models that add depth and visual variety to your fields, without straying from Minecraft's native aesthetic.
body:
# Vanilla+ Crops

Vanilla+ Crops replaces every farm crop with original pixel art and custom block models that add depth and visual variety to your fields, without straying from Minecraft's native aesthetic.
![Vanilla Plus Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/720f657a5c1bed12de575747982b691267e7d40e_0.webp)

---

### Features

**Wheat** — Eight distinct growth stages with a full green-to-gold colour progression. Mature wheat uses taller 32×32 textures so fully grown fields have real visual weight. Three random variants at harvest stage prevent repeating patterns.
![Vanilla Plus Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c822fa30219b9d43a8f435c00334cbec3f079a7f.jpeg)

**Carrots** — Feathery foliage that grows progressively denser, with a subtle orange tip peeking through the soil at maturity. Three harvest-stage variants.

**Potatoes** — Broad-leaved bushes that develop small white flower buds when fully grown, matching the real plant. Three harvest-stage variants.

**Beetroots** — Deep red stems and visible beetroot crowns at the soil line. Three harvest-stage variants.

**Sugar Cane** — Segmented stalks with visible nodes and light highlights for a cleaner, more readable silhouette.

**Melon & Pumpkin Stems** — Reworked growing and attached stem textures.

**Seeds** — Matching seed item textures for wheat, beetroot, melon, and pumpkin.

![Vanilla Plus Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1da46060ae394709f2213d53bbbde14e55fcf16f.jpeg)
---

### Models

All crops use a custom **bushy cross model** with 4–6 intersecting planes tilted at varying angles (±22.5° and ±45°), giving each plant a fuller, more three-dimensional look on farmland. Mature wheat uses an additional **tall crop model** that extends above the block boundary.

---

### Compatibility

Pack format 46 with `supported_formats` range 15–1024. No mods or dependencies required — works with vanilla Minecraft Java Edition.

Compatible with OptiFine, Sodium, and other performance mods. Safe to combine with resource packs that don't modify crop assets.

---

### Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder.
3. Enable it in **Options → Resource Packs**.

---
